entry.title: New: CC 24-21 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
BUDGET, FINANCE, AND ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT CHAIR, transmitting a proposed amendment to Bill 78, CD1 (2023) "A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE TO ESTABLISH A NEW CHAPTER 3.50, MAUI COUNTY CODE, CREATING AN IMMIGRANT SERVICES DIVISION UNITED STATES PASSPORT APPLICATION ACCEPTANCE FACILITY REVOLVING FUND".

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
